title: Cache Coherence & False Sharing in OpenMP
description: A flowchart illustrating how cache coherence mechanisms work and how false sharing occurs in parallel OpenMP applications.
relationships: Core 1 reads variable X into its cache line
Core 2 reads same cache line containing variable X
Core 1 modifies a different variable (Y) in the same cache line
Cache coherence protocol invalidates entire cache line in both caches
Forces Core 2 to re-read cache line from main memory, causing false sharing overhead
